title: ribes rubrum subsp. sativum
intro: Ribes rubrum subsp. sativum, also known as the garden raspberry or red raspberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus idaeus plant that is widely cultivated for its edible fruit and medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of this plant have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, inflammation, and menstrual cramps, due to their high content of antioxidants and bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ribes rubrum subsp. sativum include improving cardiovascular health, reducing blood pressure, and providing anti-cancer properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
